functions.label: DashboardListingTable
description:
A lazy-loaded component that renders the dashboard listing table.
This component displays a list of available dashboards with search and filter capabilities.

children.label: props
description: - The {@link DashboardListingProps} for configuring the listing table.

returnComment: A React element containing the dashboard listing table.

functions.label: DashboardTopNav
description:
A lazy-loaded component that renders the dashboard top navigation bar.
This component provides controls for dashboard editing, saving, and other actions.

children.label: props
description: - The {@link DashboardTopNavProps} for configuring the top navigation.

returnComment: A React element containing the dashboard top navigation bar.

functions.label: LazyDashboardRenderer
description:
A lazy-loaded wrapper component for the {@link DashboardRenderer}.
This component dynamically imports the dashboard renderer to reduce initial bundle size.

children.label: props
description: - The {@link DashboardRendererProps} to pass to the dashboard renderer.

returnComment: A React element containing the lazy-loaded dashboard renderer.

functions.label: migrateLegacyQuery
description:
Migrates legacy query formats to the current {@link DashboardQuery} format.
Queries without a `language` property are assumed to be Lucene queries,
since Lucene was the only option in earlier versions.
signature: (query: string | Readonly<{} & { query: string | Record<string, any>; language: string; }> | { [key: string]: any; }) => Readonly<{} & { query: string | Record<string, any>; language: string; }>

children.label: query
description: - The query to migrate, which can be a {@link DashboardQuery}, a legacy object, or a string.
signature: string | Readonly<{} & { query: string | Record<string, any>; language: string; }> | { [key: string]: any; }

functions.label: prefixReferencesFromPanel
description:
Prefixes references from a panel with the panel ID.
This is used when extracting references from panels to store at the dashboard level.
Tag references are filtered out as they should not be included in panel references.

children.label: id
description: - The panel ID to use as prefix.

children.label: references
description: - The array of {@link Reference} objects to prefix.

returnComment: An array of {@link Reference } objects with prefixed names.

interfaces.label: DashboardCapabilities
description:
Capabilities object for the Dashboard application.
Defines the permissions available for dashboard operations.

children.label: showWriteControls
description: Whether the user can see write controls (edit, save, etc.).

children.label: createNew
description: Whether the user can create new dashboards.

children.label: show
description: Whether the user can view dashboards.

children.label: [key: string]: boolean
description: Additional capability flags.
